message:
fix(runtime): reject non-canonical REPLICAOF port integers

Use parse_i64_arg() for port validation in REPLICAOF/SLAVEOF to reject
non-canonical integers like +6379 or 06379 (leading plus or zeros).
This matches Redis's strict integer parsing behavior.

Fixes 4 conformance test failures in core_replication.json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
